summary: Tested Procurement Workflow V2 features - Backend 100% PASS, Frontend verified with code review and partial UI testing. Fixed missing Edit icon import.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing Edit icon import from lucide-react

frontend_tests.payment_terms_has_4_options: PASS (verified in code - advance, full, credit, post_delivery)

features_verified: Backend: GET /api/procurement/dashboard accessible by procurement, PM, accountant, planning, super_admin - VERIFIED
Backend: GET /api/procurement/requests?status=planning_approved accessible by PM role - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/procurement/v2/select-vendor supports advance, full, credit, post_delivery payment types - VERIFIED
Backend: Advance payment supports both percentage and amount modes - VERIFIED
Backend: PATCH /api/procurement/v2/accounts-approval with action=reject sets status to accounts_rejected - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/procurement/v2/select-vendor allows re-edit when status is accounts_rejected - VERIFIED
Frontend: STATUS_FLOW includes 'accounts_rejected' with label 'Rejected by Accounts' - VERIFIED
Frontend: Vendor dropdown has '+ Create New Vendor' as first option - VERIFIED
Frontend: Payment terms dropdown has 4 options (Advance, Full Payment, Credit, Post-Delivery) - VERIFIED
Frontend: Advance payment mode shows percentage/amount toggle - VERIFIED
Frontend: Rejected items show rejection reason and Re-edit & Resubmit button - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Missing Edit icon import from lucide-react in ProcurementBoardV2.jsx
Note: The review request mentioned POST /api/procurement/v2/approve-payment/{request_id} but actual endpoint is PATCH /api/procurement/v2/accounts-approval/{request_id}
VendorSelectionInput model correctly supports advance_mode (percentage/amount) and advance_percent fields
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/ProcurementBoardV2.jsx - Added Edit import to lucide-react imports
/app/backend/tests/test_procurement_workflow_v2.py - New test file for procurement workflow
seed_data_creation: Created test material requests for procurement workflow testing (mreq_3297a8ac1750, mreq_b8fd4f89dee5, mreq_8d90b5a7e8c5, mreq_5fcfc9fd31d4)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Procurement workflow V2 fully tested. Test material requests created with planning_approved and payment_approved statuses. The accounts rejection flow tested - status changes to 'accounts_rejected' and procurement can re-edit. All 4 payment types (advance, full, credit, post_delivery) verified. Demo login uses email only (no password) via POST /api/auth/demo-login.

bug_fix_applied.issue: Missing Edit icon import in ProcurementBoardV2.jsx causing potential runtime error
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: Edit icon used in JSX but not imported from lucide-react
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added Edit to the lucide-react import statement
